headline: Education Blueprint 2013-2025 Achieves Only 42% of Targets
context: An independent review found that the Malaysia Education Blueprint met less than half of its 150 stated targets by expiry.

cards.big: Malaysia Education Blueprint 2013-2025 met only 63 of 150 stated targets
cards.sub: RM42 billion spent over 12 years with less than half of goals achieved

cards.big: PISA rankings improved by only 8 points against a target of 50 points improvement
cards.sub: International benchmarking goal was the flagship target of the Blueprint

cards.big: Teacher quality initiatives reached 60% of targets but infrastructure hit only 35%
cards.sub: Soft reforms progressed while capital investment promises went unfulfilled

cards.big: Ontario Canada achieved 84% target completion on its 2004-2014 education plan
cards.sub: Annual public reporting and independent monitoring drove accountability

cards.big: Grand education plans without accountability mechanisms are expensive wish lists
Should the next education blueprint include binding accountability for missed targets
